sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the execution of a Windows system binary that is usually located in the system folder from an uncommon location.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Patrick Bareiss, Anton Kutepov, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Files With System Process Name In Unsuspected Locations
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects the creation of an executable with a system process name in folders other than the system ones (System32, SysWOW64, etc.).
It is highly recommended to perform an initial baseline before using this rule in production.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Sander Wiebing, Tim Shelton, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detect suspicious parent processes of well-known Windows processes

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET TOR Known Tor Relay/Router (Not Exit) Node Traffic group 749
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp [86.59.21.38,86.62.157.127,86.86.173.62,87.100.255.247,87.104.37.130,87.106.168.172,87.106.169.77,87.106.192.222,87.106.193.56,87.106.229.129] any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"ET TOR Known Tor Relay/Router (Not Exit) Node Traffic group 749"; reference:url,doc.emergingthreats.net/bin/view/Main/TorRules; threshold: type limit, track by_src, seconds 60, count 1; classtype:misc-attack; flowbits:set,ET.TorIP; sid:2522748; rev:5000; metadata:affected_product Any, attack_target Any, deployment Perimeter, tag TOR, signature_severity Audit, created_at 2008_12_01, updated_at 2022_12_05;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET JA3 Hash - [Abuse.ch] Possible Troldesh Ransomware
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET JA3 Hash - [Abuse.ch] Possible Troldesh Ransomware"; ja3_hash; content:"1be3ecebe5aa9d3654e6e703d81f6928"; reference:url,sslbl.abuse.ch/ja3-fingerprints/; classtype:unknown; sid:2028760; rev:2; metadata:attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2019_10_14, deployment Perimeter, former_category JA3, signature_severity Major, tag Ransomware, updated_at 2019_10_29, mitre_tactic_id TA0040, mitre_tactic_name Impact, mitre_technique_id T1486, mitre_technique_name Data_Encrypted_for_Impact;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: SSLBL: Malicious JA3 SSL-Client Fingerprint detected (Ransomware.Troldesh)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls any any -> any any (msg:"SSLBL: Malicious JA3 SSL-Client Fingerprint detected (Ransomware.Troldesh)"; ja3_hash; content:"1be3ecebe5aa9d3654e6e703d81f6928"; reference:url, sslbl.abuse.ch/ja3-fingerprints/1be3ecebe5aa9d3654e6e703d81f6928/; sid:906200064; rev:1;)
